---
title: "Preface"
unnumbered: true

uomthesis:
  candidate:
    forename: "Jane"
    middle_initial: "Q"
    surname: "Doe"
    native_name: ""

  degree: "PhD"
  degree_full: "Doctor of Philosophy"
  faculty: "Humanities"
  school: "Alliance Manchester Business School"
  division: "MSM"
  year: 2027

  thesis_format: "standard"

  # Word count of the main text (policy section 8.1.d). Replace null with
  # an integer once the thesis is feature-complete; until then the
  # contents page prints "[Insert word count]" as a placeholder.
  word_count: null

  # Hyperlink colours in the PDF. Any named xcolor colour is valid
  # (e.g. blue, red, magenta, teal, Maroon) or `null` to keep the
  # default shown after the comment.
  hyperlink:
    cite:     "blue"      # author-year citation links + references list
    link:     "blue"      # section / figure / table / footnote refs
    url:      "magenta"   # external URLs (\url, \href)
    file:     "magenta"   # file:// links
    equation: "red"       # equation refs (\eqref, Quarto's @eq-...)

  declaration:
    variant: "either"
    joint_authorship_details: null

  ai_disclosure:
    include: false
    tools: []
    description: null

  content_notification:
    include: false
    summary: null

  optional_prelims:
    lay_abstract: false
    dedication: null
    acknowledgements: true
    preface: false

  resubmission:
    is_resubmission: false
    revisions_file: null

  covid_impact_statement: null

mainfont: "Times New Roman"
linestretch: 1.5
pdf-engine: lualatex
lang: en-GB
# Wrap each in-body citation marker in a \hyperlink{ref-key}{...} call so
# the author-year text picks up uomthesis.hyperlink.cite (blue). With the
# default `false`, pandoc-citeproc emits citations as plain black text.
link-citations: true
---

This page exists only to hold project metadata for Quarto.
